description: Idempotent re-delivery (protocol.md § Reliable Sync, #resync-coord + #durable-outbox). A Delta whose base_epoch < the receiver's last_epoch is a frame the receiver already folded (re-sent by the DurableOutbox on reconnect / retry). The ResyncCoordinator Ignores it, so at-least-once delivery yields exactly-once effect: net state is unchanged and last_epoch does not move. This is the receiver-side half of ReliableSync.outbox_at_least_once_exactly_once_effect. The OutboxAck `wire` frame validates against schemas/reliable-sync.json.

scenarios.name: replayed_delta_is_ignored
scenarios.description: Receiver at last_epoch=42 receives a re-delivered delta 40->41 (base_epoch=40 < 42). It is Ignored; state and last_epoch are unchanged.

scenarios.name: duplicate_current_head_is_ignored
scenarios.description: An exact re-delivery of the last-applied delta (base_epoch below head) is also Ignored — a duplicate never double-applies.
